payload.category_name_raw: Land and property (within or outside the UK)

fields_raw.name: StartDate
fields_raw.description: Date on which the land or property was acquired, or achieved registrable value

fields_raw.name: EndDate
fields_raw.description: Date on which interest in the property ended

fields_raw.name: IsSoleOwner
fields_raw.description: Whether the Member is the sole owner of the property

fields_raw.name: Location
fields_raw.description: Location of the land or property

fields_raw.name: RegistrableRentalIncome
fields_raw.description: Property has a rental income exceeding registrable threshold

fields_raw.name: RentalIncomeDetails
fields_raw.description: Details of any other recipients of rental income

fields_raw.name: RentalIncomeStartDate
fields_raw.description: Date on which the property began generating rental income

fields_raw.name: NumberOfProperties
fields_raw.description: The number of properties this interest relates to

fields_raw.name: IsLand
fields_raw.description: Whether the interest relates to land or property

fields_raw.name: IsAnyRentalIncomePaidToAnotherPerson
fields_raw.description: Whether any rental income is paid to another person or organisation

fields_raw.name: Country
fields_raw.description: Country in which the land or property is located
